hero.body: We design and evolve your applications at competitive costs, without intermediaries, to accelerate your business.

teamSection.title: The Kadrix team
teamSection.body: Passionate about tech challenges, we aim for excellence for each of our clients.

about.title: Passionate about tech challenges
about.p1: We aim for excellence for all our clients. We work in the most pragmatic way, in full transparency with you and your teams throughout the development process.
about.p2: We are used to working on projects with significant technical and business stakes. Whether for start-ups or large groups, we adapt our methods and are ready to take on every challenge.

foundersList.name: Aymeric du Réau
foundersList.description: Aymeric leads Kadrix after years in consulting and tech.

foundersList.name: Jean-Christophe KOURAJIAN
foundersList.description: Jean-Christophe drives product vision. He has solid experience in tech and innovation.

ctaSection.title: Start the conversation

references.title: Our references

references.trustBody: Large groups and SMBs in industry, retail, finance and tech.

equipe.title: The Kadrix team
equipe.intro: Passionate about tech challenges, we aim for excellence for each of our clients.
equipe.teamIntro: Every Kadrix member has gone through a rigorous selection process that values technical potential, team spirit and commitment to client service.

expertises.pageIntro: AI, cloud infrastructure, automation, web and cybersecurity. We support your projects from A to Z.

list.title: Artificial intelligence
list.description: Custom AI solutions, LLM, Computer Vision, predictive systems.

list.title: Cloud / On-Premise infrastructure
list.description: Design, deployment and operation of cloud or on-premise infrastructure.

list.title: Availability & monitoring (SLA)

intelligence-artificielle.title: Data & AI practice
intelligence-artificielle.subtitle: We develop custom AI solutions in record time
intelligence-artificielle.description: Our AI engineers support you in designing, developing and deploying high-impact AI models and applications.

services.title: Data & AI audit
services.text: We analyse your processes and identify concrete opportunities to integrate AI into your business.

services.title: AI applications
services.text: Design and development of custom solutions that integrate with your stack and meet your objectives.

services.title: AI models
services.text: Development of custom models (ML, Deep Learning, finetuning) for your use cases.

infrastructure-cloud.title: Cloud / On-Premise infrastructure
infrastructure-cloud.subtitle: Design, deployment and operation of your infrastructure
infrastructure-cloud.description: We design and operate cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure, OVH, Outscale…) or on-premise infrastructure tailored to your performance, cost and compliance constraints.

services.title: Public & hybrid cloud
services.text: Architecture, migration and operation of cloud or hybrid infrastructure.

services.title: On-Premise
services.text: Deployment and operation of servers and environments in your premises or datacenters.

disponibilite-monitoring.title: Availability & monitoring (SLA)
disponibilite-monitoring.subtitle: 100% SLA, supervision and high availability
disponibilite-monitoring.description: Implementation of monitoring, alerting and supervision to ensure the availability of your systems and compliance with your SLA commitments.

services.title: Monitoring & supervision
services.text: 24/7 supervision, metrics, alerting and dashboards to manage your infrastructure and applications.

services.title: High availability
services.text: Resilient architectures and recovery plans to limit downtime.

automatisation.title: Automation
automatisation.subtitle: CI/CD, pipelines and process automation
automatisation.description: We implement deployment pipelines (CI/CD), infrastructure as code and automation to accelerate and secure your deliveries.

services.title: CI/CD
services.text: Automated build, test and deployment pipelines (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, etc.).

services.title: Infrastructure as Code
services.text: Terraform, Ansible and scripts to provision and maintain your environments in a reproducible way.

developpement-sur-mesure.title: Web platforms & custom development
developpement-sur-mesure.subtitle: Performant and scalable web applications
developpement-sur-mesure.description: We design and develop custom web platforms, business software and SaaS applications tailored to your processes and growth.

services.title: Web platforms
services.text: Showcase sites, portals, dashboards and modern web applications (React, Next.js, Node.js, etc.).

services.title: Business software
services.text: Custom business tools to automate and optimise your internal processes.

services.title: SaaS applications
services.text: Scalable, multi-tenant and secure SaaS solutions.

cybersecurite.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurite.subtitle: Audit, security and best practices
cybersecurite.description: Security audits, implementation of best practices (OWASP, GDPR) and support to secure your applications and data.

services.title: Audit & compliance
services.text: Security audits (applications, infrastructure), risk analysis and compliance support (GDPR, OWASP, hardening).

services.title: Application security
services.text: Secure development best practices, secrets management, authentication and authorisation, API security.

services.title: Ongoing support
services.text: Team training, vulnerability management and incident response processes.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Kadrix is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable law.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is Kadrix. For any question regarding your personal data:

data.title: 2. Data collected
data.body: We may collect the following data:
items: Contact form: name, first name, email address, phone number, company, message and optionally budget. This data is sent via Formspree and processed to respond to your request.
Browsing: technical data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) as necessary for the operation of the site and system security.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes and legal basis
purposes.body: Data is processed to: respond to your contact requests (legal basis: pre-contractual measures / legitimate interest), ensure the proper functioning and security of the site (legitimate interest), and comply with our legal obligations.

retention.title: 4. Retention period
retention.body: Contact form data is retained for as long as necessary to process your request and then, unless you object, for a reasonable period for business exchanges (e.g. 3 years from last contact). Browsing data (logs) is retained in accordance with legal obligations (generally 12 months maximum).

recipients.title: 5. Recipients and transfers
recipients.body: Form data is transmitted to our provider Formspree for sending messages. Formspree may process data in countries recognised by the European Commission as offering an adequate level of protection, or under appropriate safeguards. We do not sell your data to third parties.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, portability and to object regarding your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at
rights.cnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.body: This site does not use analytics or advertising cookies. Only cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site (if any) may be used. If we were to use cookies for other purposes, we would update this policy and seek your consent where required by law.

changes.title: 8. Changes
changes.body: Kadrix reserves the right to modify this privacy policy. The last update date is shown at the top of the page. We invite you to check it regularly.

publisher.title: 1. Site publisher
publisher.body: The site www.kadrix.fr is published by:

director.title: 2. Publication director
director.body: The publication director is [Name of responsible person].

ip.title: 4. Intellectual property
ip.body: All content on this site (text, images, graphics, logo, structure, etc.) is protected by copyright and trademark law. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior authorisation from Kadrix is prohibited and constitutes infringement under the French Intellectual Property Code.

links.title: 5. Hyperlinks
links.body: The site may contain links to other sites. Kadrix has no control over these sites and accepts no responsibility for their content. Creating links to www.kadrix.fr is subject to prior agreement from Kadrix.

disclaimer.title: 6. Limitation of liability
disclaimer.body: Kadrix endeavours to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of the information on this site. However, Kadrix cannot guarantee the accuracy, precision or completeness of the information and accepts no liability for any errors or omissions.
